title: Casino Casualty
description:
Welcome to the Crimson Casino.You are the owner and manager of the Crimson Casino, a place once popular for its advanced robotic entertainment and high-tech games; now, feared for it, following an incident in which patrons were brutally attacked by the robotic workers. This incident has forever tainted the Crimson Casino's name, and its doors are set to close for good at the end of the day. After seeing the last of your patrons out, you lock the doors, only to be struck in the back of the head.

You wake up around an hour later, surrounded by your robotic employees. You've been locked in, and you're being forced to earn your way out using the games that you rigged.

When your life is on the line, can you risk it all?Casino Casualty is a point-n-click horror game in which you must play and wager on several casino and arcade games in order to earn enough chips to pay your way out, while fending off against the robotic employees that want nothing more than to see you fail. When your life is on the line, can you risk it all?

FEATURES:• Classic point-n-click horror gameplay across two separate story modes.

• The main story has you trapped inside the Crimson Casino, playing and wagering on the various games in order to pay your way out the door.

• The newly added sequel story, "House of Cards", in which you have been trapped by your own creations, and must search your decaying old home for the means to escape while avoiding threats old and new in a free roam point-n-click hybrid mode. Features randomly generated puzzles, item placement, and room placement, for maximum replayability.

• Four unique post-game modes:

• A free play mode where you may practice or simply enjoy the Crimson Casino's various games.

• An endless mode where you must earn as much as you can while fending off against every threat from the start.

• A custom mode where you can choose to tweak the game to your liking or take on one of the preset challenges. 

• A custom mode for House of Cards, in which you can customize certain elements of the game and take on even more preset challenges.

• 6 minigames scattered about the main story:

• A giant pinball table with butter smooth physics and a unique table-flipping mechanic

• A dice game in which you must fight the odds stacked against you with weighted dice

• A claw machine with a gambler's edge and a deadly twist

• Blackjack and Roulette, both run by the same nefarious dealer

• Slot machines!

• Over 60 Achievements!
description_short: A casino-themed point-n-click horror game where you are held captive by a group of robotic entertainers and must fight the odds stacked against you to survive. Win big, or die trying.
